domain: Moai rocking transport (D-shaped base + forward lean; rhythmic left-right rope pulls produce zig-zag pivots; forward motion is the EMERGENT geometric consequence of lateral oscillation around an off-center COM)
specific_mechanism: Forward translation purely as geometric byproduct of transverse oscillation around a leaning equilibrium; lateral rocking is the only externally-applied work; forward step is free.
llm_application: MPOO (Moai-Pivot Oscillation Optimizer): alternate transverse Δθ_⊥ left and right (orthogonal to the loss gradient) and let the forward-leaning natural drift do the descent — the optimizer never applies a direct descent step; descent is the EMERGENT geometric result of left-right transverse displacements on a leaning manifold.
novelty_claim: HGM (2506.22479) modulates the lr along the gradient direction; Sign-based Lion/Muon (2602.07425, 2502.16982) take the sign of the full gradient; Nesterov momentum looks ahead along the descent direction. MPOO is purely-transverse: the descent direction is NEVER explicitly stepped — descent emerges from the parameter-manifold's forward-lean projected onto the transverse rocking.
